rules.desc: Structural plausibility — buildings look like they could stand
rules.rationale_pass: Structure reads as plausible — load paths and massing are believable (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Structure implausible — walls, spans, or cantilevers defy credible engineering (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Material consistency — stone reads as stone, wood as wood, metal as metal
rules.rationale_pass: Materials read correctly — surfaces have appropriate weight, texture, and joinery (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Material reads wrong — surface lacks expected weight, grain, or construction logic (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Perspective accuracy — no impossible geometry or broken vanishing points
rules.rationale_pass: Perspective is accurate — vanishing points consistent, no spatial contradictions (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Perspective broken — impossible geometry, misaligned vanishing points, or spatial contradictions (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Lighting and mood — atmosphere serves narrative intent
rules.rationale_pass: Lighting carries mood — shadow, bounce, and atmosphere serve the narrative intent (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Lighting flat or contradictory — no mood, multiple shadow sources, or atmosphere works against intent (${scorePct}%)

rules.rationale_pass: Scale reads correctly — doors, windows, and elements imply consistent human proportion (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Scale inconsistent — elements contradict each other or lack human-scale reference (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Era and tech-level coherence — no anachronisms within the depicted period
rules.rationale_pass: Era coherent — construction methods, ornament, and technology match the depicted period (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Anachronism present — elements from incompatible time periods or tech levels mixed (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Weathering and aging appropriate to era, climate, and material
rules.rationale_pass: Weathering reads correctly — aging pattern matches material, climate, and implied age (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Weathering illogical — wear doesn't match material behavior, climate, or timeframe (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Style consistency within the project — rendering and design language unified
rules.rationale_pass: Style consistent — rendering approach and design language match the project standard (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Style inconsistent — rendering or design language breaks from project standard (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Detail density appropriate to distance and scale of view
rules.rationale_pass: Detail density appropriate — close-ups show construction logic, wide shots stay readable (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Detail density wrong — close-up lacks construction detail or wide shot is noisy and unreadable (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Ruin logic — decay pattern follows structural weaknesses and material behavior
rules.rationale_pass: Ruin logic holds — collapse follows structural weakness, material decay is physically plausible (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Ruin logic fails — decay is arbitrary, structure collapses where it shouldn't or survives where it can't (${scorePct}%)
